description_long: This is a compact street food kiosk with a sloped wooden roof and a pink fabric banner adorned with stylized illustrations of candied apples and Japanese kanji characters. The front counter is organized with trays of food items, a drink dispenser, and various utensils, all neatly arranged for easy access. The structure is supported by a black metal frame, with dark wood paneling forming the base and storage compartments. The side panels also feature large kanji signage, giving the kiosk a festive and inviting appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Japanese festival stalls, with a focus on accessibility and visual appeal. The kiosk lacks windows and doors, providing an open, approachable service area for customers.
description: A Japanese-style street food kiosk with a sloped wooden roof, pink banner signage, and an open front counter displaying food and utensils.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink banner with candied apple illustrations, open counter with food trays, utensils, and a drink dispenser.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the kanji signage on the side banner and a partial view of the counter's storage compartments.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full extent of the sloped wooden roof and the layout of the counter and storage areas beneath.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the kanji signage on the side banner and a clear look at the food trays and utensils on the counter.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and painted banner signage with stylized candied apple illustrations and Japanese kanji, placed above the front counter and on both side panels.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped wooden roof with a slight overhang, constructed from planks, no skylights or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Japanese festival stall with modern materials and festive signage.
